gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY_METHODOLOGY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID = T3.SURVEY_METHODOLOGY_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' OR T3.IS_REINTERVIEW_HOUSEHOLD = 'Yes' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT ASC

question: వివిధ రాష్ట్రాలు మరియు పట్టణ/గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాలలో, పేదరిక రేఖకు పైన ఉన్న గృహాలపై దృష్టి సారించి, సగటు నెలవారీ తలసరి వినియోగం మరియు మొత్తం గృహాల సంఖ్యను పోల్చండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T2 ON T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag, 
    AVG(fhp.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita, 
    COUNT(fhp.household_id) AS total_households
FROM 
    fact_household_poverty_metrics fhp
JOIN 
    fact_household_composition fhc ON fhp.household_id = fhc.household_id
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
WHERE 
    fhp.below_poverty_line_indicator = 'No'
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag
ORDER BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag;

gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Rural' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG = 'Urban' AND T3.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No';

SELECT DISTINCT T1.district 
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 
ON T1.geography_id = T2.geography_id 
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 
ON T2.household_id = T3.household_id 
WHERE T3.monthly_consumption_per_capita > T3.per_capita_poverty_line 
AND T1.census_2001_urban_rural_flag = 'Rural' 
AND T1.district NOT IN ( 
    SELECT DISTINCT T1.district 
    FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 
    JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 
    ON T1.geography_id = T2.geography_id 
    JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T3 
    ON T2.household_id = T3.household_id 
    WHERE T3.monthly_consumption_per_capita > T3.per_capita_poverty_line 
    AND T1.census_2001_urban_rural_flag = 'Urban' 
);
